publications.title: APO-Optimized ARX-Based System Identification of a Ship Maneuvering System
publications.description: System identification using adaptive parameter optimization for autonomous vessel control and maneuvering characteristics.

publications.title: Geometric Adaptive Control on SE(3) for Fully-Actuated Aerial Vehicles With Online Parameter Estimation
publications.description: Novel adaptive control method for aerial vehicles using geometric control on the SE(3) manifold with real-time parameter estimation.

publications.title: From Modeling to Control Allocation: A Geometric Approach to Variable-Tilt Hexacopter
publications.description: Comprehensive geometric framework for modeling and control allocation of variable-tilt hexacopter systems.
